'''lahafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loadspace|loadspace]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loadspace|loadspace]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lahafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læhæfæth|læhæfæth]] || [[word:læhæfæj|læhæfæj]] || [[word:læhæfæsh|læhæfæsh]] || [[word:læhæfæ|læhæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lahahafath|lahahafath]] || [[word:lahahafaj|lahahafaj]] || [[word:lahahafash|lahahafash]] || [[word:lahahafa|lahahafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lahafath|lahafath]] || [[word:lahafaj|lahafaj]] || [[word:lahafash|lahafash]] || [[word:lahafa|lahafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lahaffath|lahaffath]] || [[word:lahaffaj|lahaffaj]] || [[word:lahaffash|lahaffash]] || [[word:lahaffaf|lahaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lahafatha|lahafatha]] || [[word:lahafaja|lahafaja]] || [[word:lahafasha|lahafasha]] || [[word:lahafaka|lahafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lahafath|lahafath]] || [[word:lahafaj|lahafaj]] || [[word:lahafash|lahafash]] || [[word:lahafa|lahafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lahafathal|lahafathal]] || [[word:lahafajal|lahafajal]] || [[word:lahafashal|lahafashal]] || [[word:lahafakal|lahafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lahafathatha|lahafathatha]] || [[word:lahafajaja|lahafajaja]] || [[word:lahafashasha|lahafashasha]] || [[word:lahafaka|lahafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lahafathan|lahafathan]] || [[word:lahafajan|lahafajan]] || [[word:lahafashan|lahafashan]] || [[word:lahafakan|lahafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lahafathaoro|lahafathaoro]] || [[word:lahafajaoro|lahafajaoro]] || [[word:lahafashaoro|lahafashaoro]] || [[word:lahafakaoro|lahafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
